title: What I Wish I Knew Before My First Acquisition
description: The deal room doesn't prepare you for everything. Here are the honest lessons about due diligence, culture, and emotion that first-time acquirers need to hear.

title: Stop Waiting to Be Invited: How to Enter Any Room You Want
description: Practical tactics for women to access networks, tables, and opportunities that weren't designed with them in mind. No inspiration — just strategy.

title: Stop Writing Checks. Start Creating Real Change
description: Strategic philanthropy creates systems-level change. Here's how to move beyond reactive giving and make your generosity actually work.

title: The Fastest Path to Business Ownership Nobody Talks About
description: Starting a business isn't the only path to ownership. Acquiring an existing business is faster, lower risk, and underused by women who could afford to buy.

title: Why Women-Led Businesses Win When Markets Get Hard
description: The traits dismissed as soft—empathy, caution, collaboration—are exactly what make women-led businesses more resilient when the economy turns.

title: The Executive's Guide to Generative AI
description: What every C-suite leader needs to understand about GenAI — without the hype, without the jargon, and without wasting your time.

title: The Beginner's Guide to Angel Investing
description: How startup funding actually works, what angels do that VCs don't, and how to build a disciplined portfolio — for operators ready to become investors.

title: Empire Building in Corporate
description: How to build influence, leverage, and lasting impact inside large organizations — while building your empire on the outside.

title: Buying a Business
description: A practical framework for finding, evaluating, and acquiring a business — for operators ready to own instead of build from scratch.

title: Startup Fundraising Resources
description: The documents, frameworks, and playbooks founders need to navigate the fundraising process with confidence.

title: Startup Fundraising Toolkit
description: An interactive tool to help founders structure their fundraising strategy, messaging, and investor outreach.

title: GenAI Readiness Assessment
description: Benchmark your organization's readiness for generative AI adoption — across strategy, data, talent, and governance.

title: Vendor Evaluation Checklist
description: A structured checklist for evaluating AI and technology vendors — built for leaders who need to move fast without making expensive mistakes.

title: Prompt Engineering Playbook
description: Practical prompt engineering techniques for business leaders — no technical background required.

title: Use Case Prioritization Framework
description: A scoring framework for identifying and prioritizing the highest-value AI use cases for your organization.

title: GenAI ROI Business Case
description: A template for building a compelling internal business case for generative AI investment — with financial modeling guidance.

title: Speaking & Workshop Menu
description: Keynotes, workshops, and advisory engagements available for teams and events — topics, formats, and booking information.
